last_blueprint_folder.description: Do not delete — stores the last-open blueprint book folder so the mod can restore it on load.

markdown_table_language.description: Initial Markdown table language for saves without Designer Toolkit settings state (0=English, 1=Local, 2=Both, 3=Hybrid).

markdown_number_format.description: Initial Markdown number format for saves without Designer Toolkit settings state (0=Auto, 1=English/en-US separators, 2=Local/current-language separators).

instant_build_mode.description: Initial instant build mode for saves without BDT settings state. When enabled, BDT completes construction and deconstruction automatically.

legacy_belt_configurations.description: Initial state for legacy belt configurations (Update 1 style transport construction that allows turning and inclining/declining on the same tile).

transport_cleanup_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary transport cleanup hotkey for saves without BDT settings state. Leave empty to disable the primary binding.

transport_cleanup_hotkey_secondary.description: Initial secondary transport cleanup hotkey for saves without BDT settings state. Leave empty to disable the secondary binding.

height_filter_show_layer_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary height filter show layer hotkey. Leave empty to disable the primary binding.

height_filter_show_layer_hotkey_secondar.description: Initial secondary height filter show layer hotkey. Leave empty to disable the secondary binding.

height_filter_hide_layer_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary height filter hide layer hotkey. Leave empty to disable the primary binding.

height_filter_hide_layer_hotkey_secondar.description: Initial secondary height filter hide layer hotkey. Leave empty to disable the secondary binding.

throughput_overlay_enabled.description: Initial throughput overlay visibility state for saves without BDT settings state. When enabled, configured throughput overlays will render in-world.

throughput_glow_enabled.description: Initial throughput glow visibility state for saves without BDT settings state.

throughput_overlay_toggle_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary throughput overlay toggle hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

throughput_overlay_toggle_hotkey_seconda.description: Initial secondary throughput overlay toggle hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

throughput_aoe_tool_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary throughput AoE tool hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

throughput_aoe_tool_hotkey_secondary.description: Initial secondary throughput AoE tool hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

layout_box_mode_toggle_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary layout box mode toggle hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

layout_box_mode_toggle_hotkey_secondary.description: Initial secondary layout box mode toggle hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

throughput_heatmap_mode.description: Initial throughput heatmap mode for saves without BDT settings state (0=None, 1=Relative, 2=Capacity).

throughput_colorblind_mode.description: Initial throughput colorblind-friendly colors mode for saves without BDT settings state.

throughput_show_as_percent.description: Initial throughput show as percent mode for saves without BDT settings state.

layout_box_mode_enabled.description: Initial layout box mode visibility state for saves without BDT settings state. When enabled, building occupancy hitboxes will render in 3D.

use_recycle_bin.description: Initial state for using the blueprint recycle bin. When enabled, deleted or updated blueprints are copied to the recycle bin folder.

recycle_bin_folder_name.description: Initial folder name for the blueprint recycle bin.

undo_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary undo placement hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

undo_hotkey_secondary.description: Initial secondary undo placement hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

pollution_overlay_enabled.description: Initial pollution overlay visibility state. When enabled, configured pollution overlays will render in-world.

pollution_days_to_average.description: Initial pollution days to average (0-360, 0 disables data collection).

pollution_show_air.description: Initial state for showing air pollution.

pollution_show_ground.description: Initial state for showing ground and water pollution.

pollution_show_vehicle.description: Initial state for showing vehicle and train pollution.

pollution_show_ship.description: Initial state for showing ship pollution.

pollution_overlay_toggle_hotkey_primary.description: Initial primary pollution overlay toggle hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

pollution_overlay_toggle_hotkey_secondar.description: Initial secondary pollution overlay toggle hotkey. Leave empty to disable.

dtkSettingsStateJson.description: Internal per-save Designer Toolkit settings state. Editing may reset saved BDT settings.

bdtRateLimitsStateJson.description: Internal per-save Designer Toolkit rate limits state. Editing may reset saved BDT rate limits.

bdtThroughputConfigStateJson.description: Internal per-save Designer Toolkit throughput configurations state. Editing may reset saved BDT throughput configs.
